concepts_used.title: 排队论基础（M/M/1）
concepts_used.how_used: 将乘客出站过程划分为四个阶段，并采用 d/d/s 排队模型计算各阶段时间，包括下车、平台行走、排队和楼梯行走。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We used the knowledge of former research and d/d/s queuing model in order to calculate the time of the four periods.

concepts_used.title: 元胞自动机
concepts_used.how_used: 采用元胞自动机模型模拟乘客出站过程，考虑拥堵对移动速度和规则的影响，并可视化模拟过程。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: we adopted a simulation approach based on cellular automaton model. Different from the mathematical model, the simulation model simulated several periods of unloading processes as a complete process, and considered the effects of congestion on the moving speed and moving rule of passengers.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 改变列车到达数量、楼梯位置、楼梯数量和每个楼梯容量等变量，运行模拟模型观察对卸载时间的影响。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To understand the effect of different factors, we changed variables such as the number of trains arriving, the location and number of staircases, and the capacity of each staircase to see their impact on unloading time.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 列出8条模型假设，包括每节车厢容量、楼梯均匀分布、所有乘客下车、单队列、乘客选择最近出口等，并给出每条假设的合理性说明。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In order to streamline our model, we have made several key assumptions. Assumption: Each car of a train can contain 90 people. Justification: There are 5 seats in each row in the given information...

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 使用流程图展示乘客出站过程的四个阶段（下车、平台行走、排队、楼梯行走），并引用北京轨道交通下车时间与人数关系的散点图及拟合曲线。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: As shown in Fig.1, the process what a passenger exits the station includes four periods: 1. waits at the queue inside a car to exit the train; 2. walks towards the staircase; 3. waits in the queue to go upstairs; 4. moves upwards on a staircase.

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 引用已有研究，建立下车时间与下车人数之间的线性关系模型，用于计算下车阶段时间。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: The research[3] completed by Shouhua Cao has shown that there is a linear relation between alighting time and the number of alighting passengers in Beijing rail transit as shown in Fig. 2.

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要（Summary）、引言（Introduction）、方法（Mathematical Model和Simulation Model）、结果（通过改变变量分析影响）、讨论（给交通局长的信）。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Summary ... 1 Introduction and Problem Restatement ... 2 Definitions, Assumptions and Variables ... 3 Mathematical Model ... 4 Simulation Model ... 5 Results ... 6 Letter to the Director of Transportation
